qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unauthenticated remote code execution via script execution engine with security disabled by default
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different root cause: the finding reports unauthenticated /api/runscript access when secureEnabled is false plus Module._compile() of attacker-controlled script.code, while the advisory concerns forged JWTs from the hardcoded fallback signing secret frangoteam751 in server/api/jwt-helper.js when no secretCode is configured.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No final qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described hardcoded fallback JWT signing secret or the equivalent JWT token-forgery root cause. The only final qualifying finding is a separate unauthenticated RCE path through disabled security defaults and the script execution engine.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-c8m8-3jcr-6rj5 describes a static fallback JWT signing secret (frangoteam751) used by FUXA when no secretCode is configured, enabling forged JWT tokens and authentication bypass.
Session manifest lists only one final finding folder: unauthenticated-rce-script-engine.

unauthenticated-rce-script-engine/vulnerability_report.json describes secureEnabled defaulting false, verifyApiOrToken skipping authentication, /api/runscript accepting script.code, and msm.js compiling attacker-controlled JavaScript with Module._compile().
The final finding does not identify server/api/jwt-helper.js, secretCode fallback handling, frangoteam751, JWT signing, JWT verification, or forged-token authentication bypass.
